data.title: Central Pacific Financial Highlights Resilience in 2025 Presentation
data.description:
Central Pacific Financial ( (CPF) ) just unveiled an update.

Central Pacific Financial Corp. presented a slide presentation in March 2025, highlighting forward-looking statements regarding its financial projections and strategic plans. The presentation emphasized the company’s resilience amid economic challenges, with a net income of $11.3 million in Q4 and $53.4 million for the full year 2024, supported by a strong real estate market, low unemployment, and robust construction activity in Hawaii.

More about Central Pacific Financial

Central Pacific Financial Corp. is a Hawaii-based bank holding company, with its subsidiary Central Pacific Bank being the fourth largest financial institution in Hawaii. Founded in 1954 by Japanese-American veterans, the bank focuses on residential mortgage, small business banking, and digital banking, operating 27 branches across the state.

data.title: Qian Xun Technology Unveils AI Tool for Pre-Owned 3C Market
data.description:
Ruicheng (China) Media Group Limited ( (HK:1640) ) has provided an announcement.

Qian Xun Technology Limited has launched the ‘Fenhao Cloud AI Assistant,’ the first AI tool for pre-owned 3C transactions, utilizing DeepSeek’s advanced AI model. This tool integrates real-time transaction data with intelligent decision-making capabilities, offering functions such as intelligent pricing, price adjustment, risk warning, and automatic procurement, marking a significant advancement in AI-driven services for the pre-owned 3C industry.

More about Ruicheng (China) Media Group Limited

Qian Xun Technology Limited, formerly known as Ruicheng (China) Media Group Limited, operates in the technology industry, focusing on AI-driven solutions. The company is known for its innovative products and services, particularly in the realm of AI and big data, targeting the pre-owned 3C (computer, communication, and consumer electronics) market.

data.title: Meridian Mining’s Cabaçal Project Shows Strong Economic Potential
data.description:
Meridian Mining SE ( (TSE:MNO) ) has shared an update.

Meridian Mining SE has announced the results of its Pre-Feasibility Study for the Cabaçal project, revealing a post-tax net present value of USD 984 million and an internal rate of return of 61.2%. The study highlights the project’s potential as a high-margin gold-copper-silver mine, with an average annual production of 141,000 gold-equivalent ounces over ten years. The project is expected to have low all-in sustaining costs and a strong value proposition, with initial capital repaid in 17 months. This positions Cabaçal as a significant asset in Brazil’s mining sector, promising substantial returns for stakeholders.

More about Meridian Mining SE

Meridian Mining SE is a mining company focused on the exploration and development of mineral resources, primarily gold, copper, and silver. The company is working on advancing the Cabaçal gold-copper-silver deposit in Brazil, aiming to establish it as a mid-tier production asset with significant economic potential.

YTD Price Performance: 21.25%

Average Trading Volume: 268,988

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$147.8M

data.title: Cencora to Update 2025 Financial Guidance at Conference
data.description:
Cencora ( (COR) ) has provided an update.

On March 10, 2025, Cencora, Inc. executives will present at the Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference, where they will update their fiscal year 2025 financial guidance. The adjusted diluted earnings per share for fiscal 2025 is now projected to be between $15.30 and $15.60, reflecting positive momentum in their core U.S. Healthcare Solutions segment.

data.title: Croda International Announces Change in Major Shareholder Voting Rights
data.description:
Croda International ( (GB:CRDA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Croda International Plc has announced a change in the voting rights held by Massachusetts Financial Services Company, which now holds 5.27% of the voting rights in Croda, up from a previous 4.99%. This change reflects an acquisition or disposal of voting rights and is significant for stakeholders as it indicates a shift in the ownership structure, potentially impacting company decisions and strategic directions.

More about Croda International

Croda International Plc is a UK-based company operating in the specialty chemicals industry. It is known for producing high-performance ingredients and technologies used in a variety of markets, including personal care, health care, crop care, and industrial applications.

data.title: TRX Gold Announces 2024 Annual Meeting Results and Welcomes New Director
data.description:
Tanzanian Royalty Exploration ( (TSE:TRX) ) just unveiled an update.

TRX Gold Corporation announced the results of its Annual General and Special Meeting held on February 27, 2025, where shareholders voted in favor of all business items, including the appointment of new directors and the renewal of the company’s Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan. John McVey was welcomed as the newest board member, bringing extensive experience from his previous role as CEO of Procon Mining & Tunnelling. The meeting’s outcomes are expected to support TRX Gold’s strategic growth plans and enhance its leadership as it continues to develop the Buckreef Gold Project.

More about Tanzanian Royalty Exploration

TRX Gold Corporation is engaged in advancing the Buckreef Gold Project, which is supported by a Mineral Resource published in May 2020. The project hosts a Measured and Indicated Mineral Resource of 35.88 million tonnes at 1.77 grams per tonne gold, containing 2,036,280 ounces of gold, and an Inferred Mineral Resource of 17.8 million tonnes at 1.11 grams per tonne gold for 635,540 ounces of gold. The company aims to increase gold production to generate positive cash flow, which will be used for exploratory drilling and advancing project development. TRX Gold adheres to high environmental, social, and corporate governance standards, maintaining strong relationships and programs in the Geita Region, Tanzania.

YTD Price Performance: -1.90%

Average Trading Volume: 486,328

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $87.28M

data.title: Shanghai Chicmax Schedules Board Meeting to Discuss Annual Results and Dividend
data.description:
Shanghai Chicmax Cosmetics Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2145) ) has shared an update.

Shanghai Chicmax Cosmetics Co., Ltd. has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 20, 2025, to discuss and approve the company’s annual results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The meeting will also consider the recommendation for a final dividend payment, highlighting the company’s ongoing financial strategies and potential returns for stakeholders.

Shanghai Chicmax Cosmetics Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating within the cosmetics industry. The company focuses on producing and distributing a range of cosmetic products, aiming to cater to diverse consumer needs in the market.

data.title: Nazara Subsidiary Secures Loan for Expansion
data.description:
Nazara Technologies Ltd. ( (IN:NAZARA) ) has shared an update.

Nazara Technologies Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Nodwin Gaming Private Limited, has extended a guarantee of up to EUR 1,560,000 to secure a loan for Freaks 4U Gaming GmbH, another subsidiary. This financial move is aimed at supporting business needs such as working capital and expansion plans. Currently, the guarantee has no immediate impact on Nazara’s financial statements, other than being noted as a contingent liability.

More about Nazara Technologies Ltd.

Nazara Technologies Ltd. operates in the gaming and digital sports industry, with a focus on markets in India, the Middle East, Africa, and Europe. The company offers a range of gaming products and services, leveraging its subsidiaries to expand its market presence.
